title: rubus lingua
intro: Rubus lingua, also known as the Tongue-Ruby or Red Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins and ellagic acid, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus lingua include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and protect against certain types of cancer. Rubus lingua can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are used to promote digestive health, reduce menstrual cramps, and support immune function.
